chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2096 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.8305/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.12.2025 Mr. Javed Iqbal, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Aijaz Ali Burdi, Investigating Officer Crime No.47 of 2025 of PS Lakha Road, District Naushahro Feroze, SIP Ali Murad Narejoi on behalf of SSP, Khairpur, SIP Muhammad Ashraf Chang on behalf of SSP, Naushahro Feroze and SIP Ghulam Abbas Kalhoro, SHO PS Akri @ Faiz Ganj. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG files statements of Respondents No.2, 3, 4, 5 & 6, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. SIP Aijaz Ali Burdi, Investigating Officer Crime No.47 of 2025 of Police Station, Lakha Road, District Naushahro Feroze is present and submits that he has recorded 161 CrPC statement of Petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Haneefa, in which she has stated that nobody has enticed or abducted her but she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2, namely Jinsar Ali Khaskheli with her own free will. She further stated that the FIR lodged by her father against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst.Haneefa, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of Law having jurisdiction for disposal of case under “C” class.

She further stated that the FIR lodged by her father against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst.Haneefa, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of Law having jurisdiction for disposal of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
